title: AI Attribution
description: Canonical attribution payload for AI-generated artifacts across CDiT content skills (Bildsprache, Klartext, Writings). See docs/ai-attribution.md for examples and field semantics.

schema_version.description: Major version of this schema. Consumers pinned to v1 must refuse to parse payloads with a different major version.

model.description: Provider-canonical model ID (e.g. gpt-image-2, flux-2-flex, gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview, recraftv4).

model_version.description: Provider-published version or dated snapshot (e.g. gpt-image-2-2026-04-21). May equal model when the provider does not publish snapshots.

input.description: Total input tokens reported by the provider. Null when the provider does not report tokens (e.g. BFL, Recraft).

output.description: Total output tokens reported by the provider. Null when not reported.

breakdown.description: Provider-specific sub-counts. Common keys: text_input, image_input, cached_input, image_output, partial_image_overhead, thinking.

amount_eur.description: EUR-equivalent cost estimate. Derived from source_amount * fx_rate.

method.description: Pricing table identifier that produced this cost (e.g. table-v1).

source_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the source amount.

source_amount.description: Cost in the provider billing currency.

fx_rate.description: FX rate used to convert source_amount to amount_eur.

tier.description: Billing tier applied, if relevant to the provider.

breakdown_usd.description: Per-component USD breakdown. Common keys: input, cached_input, output, per_image.

params.description: Exact generation parameters used, enough to reproduce the call. Keys depend on provider (e.g. size, quality, output_format for images).

prompt_anchor.description: Author-provided prompt text. Used as the caption/attribution source — this is what the author intended, independent of any provider auto-revision.

prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the effective prompt sent to the provider, prefixed with 'sha256:'.

revised_prompt.description: Provider-revised prompt text when the provider rewrote the input (e.g. OpenAI Responses API). Debug/transparency only — captions should render prompt_anchor.

sources.description: References used to produce this artifact. Empty array is valid when no sources were used.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must end in Z — non-UTC timestamps are a validation error.

synthid.description: True when the provider stamps a SynthID watermark on output (currently only Gemini).

c2pa.description: True when the provider ships C2PA-signed output. False for all current providers.

exif_signature.description: Identifier of the Bildsprache EXIF/XMP payload version stamped on images (e.g. bildsprache-v1). Absent for non-image artifacts.

provenance.description: Upstream provenance signals. Report what the provider actually stamped — do not fabricate.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the generated artifact when applicable (e.g. de, en). Optional in v1; may become required in v1.1.
